articles.title: Gold Miner Genesis Makes Rival $3.9 Billion Bid for Vault

articles.title: Chip Stock Bulls Count on Samsung to Soothe AI Trade Jitters
articles.summary: A wild ride for global chip stocks in recent weeks has left investors looking for fresh validation of the artificial intelligence trade. Samsung Electronics Co. may provide just that on Tuesday.
